title: harden IPv6 leak path on dual-stack ISP
description:
Force-DNS rule (install.sh:1551) is family='ipv4' only — LAN client over IPv6 querying [2606:4700:4700::1111]:53 bypasses AGH+mihomo, breaks fake-IP routing on dual-stack ISP. Fix (scorched-earth, matching habr.com/ru/articles/1020866 approach): disable IPv6 on gateway wholesale.

Changes:
- uci set network.wan6.auto='0' (only if network.wan6 section exists)
- uci set network.globals.ula_prefix=''
- AGH yaml: aaaa_disabled: true (was false)

Surfaced 2026-04-28 evaluating Habr xray-TPROXY article. See memory project_force_dns_ipv4_only_leak.md.
notes:
Live-applied на роутере 2026-04-28 (PPPoE dual-stack ISP, WAN IPv6 = 2a02:ad8:101:...). Жалоба 'опять не работает зарубежные сайты' с Mac → корневое: WAN6 + ra_slaac=1 + ula_prefix включены, LAN получал 2a02:ad8:4071:f000::/60 RA, клиенты ходили IPv6-путём мимо нашего :53 DNAT (family=ipv4).

Окончательный набор UCI (из live-fix, install.sh/install_simple.sh harden_ipv6() расширены до этого варианта):
- network.wan.ipv6='0'           ← обязательно, иначе PPPoE торгует IPCPv6
- network.wan6.auto='0' + disabled='1'
- network.globals.ula_prefix=''
- dhcp.lan.dhcpv6='disabled'
- dhcp.lan.ra='disabled'
- dhcp.lan.ra_slaac='0'
+ AGH yaml aaaa_disabled: true (только install.sh — install_simple.sh без AGH)

Verify post-fix: ip -6 addr show pppoe-wan = (no v6); ip -6 addr show br-lan = link-local only; mihomo alive (pid 17524); curl -sI https://www.youtube.com = HTTP/2 200.

Нужна client-side проверка (Mac/Win) что YT/google теперь открываются.

title: Fix YOUTUBE proxy-group default to VLESS-REALITY
description: Smart TV YouTube hangs because YOUTUBE selector defaults to DIRECT in proxy-group [DIRECT, VLESS-REALITY]. RU ISP DPI blocks TCP/443 to youtube.com → Smart TV YT app (TCP-only, no QUIC fallback) hangs with download=0. PC Chrome works because uses QUIC which bypasses DPI throttle differently. Fix: swap order in install.sh setup_nikki_profile YOUTUBE group to [VLESS-REALITY, DIRECT] so default = VLESS-REALITY. Also revert yt_mss MSS=88 clamp (bd-eik epic) — useless because fw4 postrouting mss-clamp overrides it, and problem was not MTU.
close_reason: verified fixed in d54d339 — install.sh:1045/1053/1056 all use [VLESS-REALITY, DIRECT]; install.sh:831 uses [ -x /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws ]

title: feat: idempotency state-file для install.sh
description: Цель: при повторном запуске install.sh пропускать выполненные шаги, чтобы возобновлять с точки сбоя. Реализация: /etc/openwrt-setup-state с per-step флагами (step7_nikki=done, step10_agh=done и т.д.). Helpers: state_check_done/state_mark_done. --force-config очищает state. Каждый install_*/configure_* в начале вызывает should_skip_step.
close_reason: Landed in install.sh: state-file idempotency (fwf), setup_first_time sysctl tweaks (i9b), luci-app-sqm/cake (8zg), luci-app-statistics+collectd (rkz), argon theme (555). Verified live on TR3000 v1 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 2026-04-27.

title: bug: --force-config reseeds AGH bind_port: 3000
description: Documented in README.md and ROADMAP.md §Known limitations. When --force-config is used, the generated AdGuardHome.yaml overwrites the operator's chosen admin port (e.g. 8080 from first-run wizard). Fix: preserve bind_port if target file already exists and was customized, or refuse --force-config when admin port deviates from default. Until fixed, operators must re-run the AGH wizard after every --force-config.
close_reason: configure_adguard reads existing bind_port and preserves across --force-config. tests/test_agh_bind_port.sh covers 7 cases under sh+dash. Docs updated (README, README_RU, ROADMAP, TROUBLESHOOTING, CHANGELOG).

title: bug: DoH/DoT clients with hardcoded IPs bypass AdGuard Home
description: Force-DNS firewall rule only redirects udp/tcp :53. Clients that hardcode resolvers like 1.1.1.1:443 (DoH) or 1.1.1.1:853 (DoT) reach upstream directly, bypassing AGH filtering. Documented in ROADMAP.md §Known limitations. Fix path: additional firewall block of known DoH/DoT endpoint IPs, or require LAN-wide HTTPS MITM (out of scope).

title: roadmap: extract VLESS URL parser + fixture-based tests
description: Refactor VLESS URL parsing out of install.sh into a standalone sh function + fixture directory with valid URLs and crafted broken ones (missing pbk, wrong security=, mangled sid). Smoke runs the parser against fixtures without touching the router. Prerequisite for any parser change.
close_reason: Commits 3c055cb (harness) + 5c4287b (dash fix); CI run 24799820687 success; 9/9 fixtures pass on sh and dash

title: roadmap: IPv6 policy flag --ipv6 {bypass,drop,route}
description: Currently mihomo fake-IP is v4-only; v6 traffic bypasses the proxy. Need explicit policy: document in README, optionally implement --ipv6 bypass (default today, explicit), drop (blackhole v6), route (try to tunnel — requires mihomo v6 fake-IP which may not exist). See ROADMAP.md §Near-term.
notes: Minimum-path doc section landed in commit fd4bd40 (README + README_RU 'IPv6 behavior'). Flag implementation (--ipv6 bypass/drop/route) remains open — needs hardware testing since it touches firewall generator and mihomo profile.

title: roadmap: OpenWrt 26.x support
description: Extend SUPPORTED_RELEASES to include 26.x. Verify apk/opkg detection path still works, run full 12-step pipeline on a clean 26.x image. Blocked until OpenWrt 26.x ships.

title: Roadmap: OpenWrt Gateway development tracker
description: Parent container mirroring ROADMAP.md. Sub-items (feature/task/bug) are filed separately and reference this epic by prefix 'roadmap:' in their titles. Closing criterion: all children closed or explicitly deferred/superseded.

title: CI baseline: shellcheck + sh -n + markdownlint
description: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs shellcheck -s sh on install.sh + uninstall.sh, sh -n syntax smoke, and markdownlint on docs. Trigger: push to main and pull requests. No deploy pipeline.
close_reason: CI workflow merged in 45843cc; GitHub Actions run 24799364821 completed with conclusion=success. Stage B complete.

title: Docs baseline
description: Stage A of roadmap execution: add LICENSE, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, ARCHITECTURE, TROUBLESHOOTING, GitHub issue/PR templates. Brings project-hygiene docs up to the level the README and ROADMAP already assume.
close_reason: All 9 docs files landed in commit bdc15d3 and pushed to origin/main. Stage A of ROADMAP execution plan is complete.

title: AGH WebUI отвергает 127.0.0.1:1053 без схемы
description: Pre-seeded AGH config (install.sh:1419,1422,1459) использует host:port без схемы для нестандартных портов. WebUI валидатор отвергает: 'Сервер 127.0.0.1:1053: невозможно использовать'. Заменить на udp:// форму.
close_reason: Fixed in 2b9c89c — udp:// scheme на AGH upstream'ах с нестандартными портами; verified live на роутере

title: mihomo: switch DoH/DoT upstreams to plain UDP
description: Replace DoH cloudflare-dns/dns.google and DoT adguard-dns in mihomo dns block with plain 1.1.1.1/8.8.8.8/8.8.4.4 per operator request. AGH upstream_dns and bootstrap_dns already plain. Reverses prior DoH-Cloudflare preference (2026-04-27).
close_reason: Replaced 5 DoH/DoT URLs with plain UDP (1.1.1.1/1.0.0.1/8.8.8.8/8.8.4.4) in install.sh mihomo dns block. Quality gates green: sh -n, dash -n, shellcheck clean.

title: SmartTV YouTube: real-IP for YT domains + TCP MSS clamp
description: Port Medium1992/mihomo-proxy-ros SmartTV YouTube workaround to OpenWrt installer. Add www.youtube.com/+.googlevideo.com/+.ytimg.com to mihomo fake-ip-filter (real-IP) and TCPMSS clamp on forward chain for traffic to YouTube ASN. Reason: Smart TV YT app drops video on path-MTU issues without aggressive MSS clamp (Medium1992 uses MSS=88 on YT-bound SYN).
close_reason: feat(install): MSS clamp + fake-ip-filter www.youtube.com — verified live on TR3000 (commit 5e2901b)

title: feat: первичная настройка best practice (Step 0)
description: Консервативные tweaks для чистого OpenWrt, выполняются один раз: 1) system.@system[0].conloglevel=4 (меньше dmesg-спама с stock 8). 2) sysctl net.netfilter.nf_conntrack_max=65536 (роутерный default слишком мал для много-устройств LAN). 3) sysctl net.ipv4.tcp_fastopen=3. 4) sysctl net.ipv4.tcp_congestion_control=bbr (только если модуль уже установлен — НЕ ставим принудительно). 5) sysctl vm.swappiness=10 (предпочитать RAM, swap на USB). Не трогаем hostname/timezone/password/wifi-country (user territory). Идемпотентно через step0_first_time=done.
close_reason: Landed in install.sh: state-file idempotency (fwf), setup_first_time sysctl tweaks (i9b), luci-app-sqm/cake (8zg), luci-app-statistics+collectd (rkz), argon theme (555). Verified live on TR3000 v1 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 2026-04-27.

title: feat: install luci-app-sqm с алгоритмом cake
description: apk add luci-app-sqm sqm-scripts kmod-sched-cake. UCI: sqm.@queue[0] на wan, qdisc=cake, script=piece_of_cake.qos, linklayer=ethernet, overhead=44. Bandwidth НЕ задаётся (user-specific) — оставляем 0/0 с предупреждением в summary что user должен задать через Luci. Идемпотентно через step13_sqm=done.
close_reason: Landed in install.sh: state-file idempotency (fwf), setup_first_time sysctl tweaks (i9b), luci-app-sqm/cake (8zg), luci-app-statistics+collectd (rkz), argon theme (555). Verified live on TR3000 v1 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 2026-04-27.

title: feat: install luci-app-statistics + collectd
description: apk add luci-app-statistics collectd collectd-mod-{cpu,interface,iwinfo,load,memory,network,rrdtool,thermal,uptime} rrdtool1. Enable+start collectd. Идемпотентно через step12_statistics=done. Графики трафика/нагрузки/температуры доступны в Luci → Statistics.
close_reason: Landed in install.sh: state-file idempotency (fwf), setup_first_time sysctl tweaks (i9b), luci-app-sqm/cake (8zg), luci-app-statistics+collectd (rkz), argon theme (555). Verified live on TR3000 v1 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 2026-04-27.

title: feat: install argon Luci theme
description: apk add luci-theme-argon (jerrykuku) + luci-i18n-argon-config-ru (если не --no-i18n). uci set luci.main.mediaurlbase=/luci-static/argon. Идемпотентно через step11_argon=done.
close_reason: Landed in install.sh: state-file idempotency (fwf), setup_first_time sysctl tweaks (i9b), luci-app-sqm/cake (8zg), luci-app-statistics+collectd (rkz), argon theme (555). Verified live on TR3000 v1 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 2026-04-27.

title: install.sh: GitHub-releases fallback for nikki when feed.sh/CF Pages is DPI-blocked
description: Real-world failure on RU ISP: TCP/443 to nikkinikki.pages.dev (Cloudflare Pages, AS13335) is sinkholed by SNI-based DPI; feed.sh download fails, apk update reports 'unavailable', and 'apk add nikki ...' dies with 'no such package'. The script then triggers its rollback prompt. Add fallback path: if the upstream feed (feed.sh fetch OR pkg_install_untrusted) fails, download tar.gz from github.com/nikkinikki-org/OpenWrt-nikki releases (which is reachable) for DETECTED_ARCH+OpenWrt minor and apk-install the bundled .apk files locally. Hard-die only if BOTH paths fail. Logs WARN on fallback so the user notices upstream is broken.
close_reason: Implemented in install.sh: install_nikki_via_feed → install_nikki_via_github fallback. Verified on TR3000 v1 / 25.12.2 / aarch64_cortex-a53: nikkinikki.pages.dev DPI-sinkholed; GitHub release v1.26.0 tarball downloaded and apk add --allow-untrusted succeeded. Committed in 1b8093e along with sibling install bug fixes.

title: zapret install check uses command -v instead of binary path
description: install.sh:634 used 'command -v nfqws' which fails because zapret v72 ships nfqws at /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws (not in $PATH). Caused exit 1 mid-install on Netis N6 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 / mipsel_24kc deploy 2026-04-25 even though zapret post-install hook started the daemon successfully (pgrep nfqws confirmed running PID 6783). The self-test at install.sh:1109 already uses 'pidof nfqws' which works regardless of PATH; only the post-install assertion was wrong. Fixed: changed check to '[ -x /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws ]'.
close_reason: verified fixed in d54d339 — install.sh:1045/1053/1056 all use [VLESS-REALITY, DIRECT]; install.sh:831 uses [ -x /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws ]

title: roadmap-testing: uninstall parity test
description: Test that uninstall.sh returns the system to pre-install state by UCI-section + installed-package diff. Automated, not manual. See docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md for the diff recipe.

title: roadmap-testing: hardware matrix (MIPS + ARMv7 smoke)
description: Netis N6 is reference (aarch64). Need smoke runs on at least one MIPS and one ARMv7 OpenWrt device before any release, to catch package-manager and endianness regressions. See ROADMAP.md §Testing.

title: roadmap-testing: fixture-based preflight runner
description: Harness that runs preflight steps 1-4 against a set of crafted inputs (.config files + VLESS URL corpus, valid + broken + edge-case) without a real router. Prerequisite for fearless preflight refactoring.
notes: Partial landing — preflight_release covered. install.sh now honors OPENWRT_RELEASE_FILE/MEMINFO_FILE env overrides; tests/test_preflight_release.sh exercises 11 cases (valid 24.10/25.04/25.12, unsupported release, bad arch, low RAM, missing file, env override, detected globals) using a tmp PATH shim for apk+id. CI wired. Remaining: harness for preflight_extroot (needs /proc/mounts + df mocks) and preflight_conflicts (needs pidof/ss/uci/curl mocks). Bead stays OPEN until full step 1-3 coverage.

title: roadmap: multi-profile (multiple VLESS URLs with select-group)
description: Support several VLESS URLs routed through mihomo select-group, switchable via LuCI or CLI. Extends install.sh --vless-url to accept multiple values.

title: roadmap: nikki subscription auto-update + health-check rollback
description: Cron job refreshes VLESS/subscription profile; health-check after reload; if mihomo fails to start, roll back to previous profile. Requires a dedicated snapshot slot in backup dir.

title: roadmap: zapret NFQWS auto-tune wrapper
description: Wrap /opt/zapret/blockcheck.sh and write the picked NFQWS_OPT back into /etc/config/zapret without manual LuCI edit. Add a 'reprobe' command for periodic re-checks.

title: roadmap: per-client routing (MAC/IP → nikki rule tag)
description: Map LAN clients by MAC/IP to rule tags inside the nikki profile. Needs DHCP host-file integration and new UCI section in /etc/config/nikki. See ROADMAP.md §Mid-term.

title: roadmap: snapshot diff tool
description: Utility that shows what install.sh changed vs base image (UCI diff + new files). Helps diagnosing on third-party hardware.

title: roadmap: unified audit log /var/log/mihomo-gateway/
description: Single rotated log of pipeline steps (instead of scattering across stdout + syslog). Use logrotate. Helps remote diagnostics.

title: roadmap: rescue.sh — recovery mode without full reinstall
description: Restart pipeline from the last snapshot without removing packages. For cases when mihomo dies after reboot and full uninstall.sh is too heavy. See ROADMAP.md §Long-term.

value: AGH WebUI валидатор отвергает host:port без схемы для нестандартных портов (всё что != 53). YAML/dnsproxy парсер лояльнее, поэтому pre-seed работает на старте, но 'Настройки → DNS → Сохранить' падает с 'Сервер X: невозможно использовать'. Фикс: писать udp://host:port (для domain-spec — [/dom/]udp://host:port). install.sh:1419-1422,1459 — fixed 2026-04-28 в 2b9c89c.

BusyBox на OpenWrt 25.12 для диагностики mihomo API: НЕТ python3, НЕТ jq, НЕТ timeout, НЕТ nslookup -port= flag (busybox nslookup отбрасывает port). Парсить JSON через sed/awk: tr '{' '\n' | grep '"sourceIP":"X"' | sed -n 's/.*"key":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'. Для timeout использовать ssh ConnectTimeout либо busybox watch -t 1. nslookup поддерживает только 'host SERVER' positional, без флагов.

BusyBox 'ss' applet (OpenWrt 25.12.x stock) НЕ реализует флаг -p (PID/process info — iproute2-only feature). 'ss -lntup' либо игнорирует -p тихо либо не печатает users:(("name",pid=N,fd=K)) колонку. Selftest helper '_port_owner port name' который пытается grep "" из ss -p вывода всегда даст false-negative на стоке. Workaround: 'pidof name >/dev/null && ss -lntu | awk -v p=":port\$" \ ~ p {f=1; exit} END{exit !f}' — verify (a) процесс жив, (b) что-то слушает порт. Lower bar но работает на стоке. Альтернатива: install iproute2 'ss' пакет как preflight-зависимость. Discovered 2026-04-28 при architect-review iter3 для install_simple.sh.

uci -q get firewall.@redirect[N].name возвращает rc=1 ОДИНАКОВО для (а) entry не существует и (б) entry без option name. Forward-walk цикл 'uci get .name || break' вылетает на первом безымянном redirect (DHCP-relay/NAT без name) — старая Force-DNS запись остаётся, re-install создаёт дубликат. Safe pattern: backward-walk через '_max=$(uci -q show firewall | grep -cE "^firewall\.@redirect\[[0-9]+\]=redirect$")' + цикл от _max-1 к 0 (deleting высший индекс не сдвигает младшие). Использовать тот же паттерн для @rule, @zone и др. Discovered 2026-04-28 in install_simple.sh:849; install.sh:1532-1542 имеет ту же проблему (forward-skip с continue, но get .name всё равно может вернуть пусто).

mihomo /proxies/<name> с history:[] означает: URL-test НЕ запускался ни разу. alive:true в этом случае default-значение, не результат проверки. Профиль без proxy-group типа url-test (только select) → endpoint никогда не валидируется. Если real endpoint лёг (CGNAT-блокировка UDP/443 на AmneziaWG, например) → весь PROXY-трафик встаёт без fallback. install.sh должен либо генерировать url-test группу, либо явно прокидывать [VLESS-REALITY, AWG-home, DIRECT] для рабочего fallback.

В POSIX shell с 'set -eu' паттерн 'cmd args; _rc=$?' — всегда баг: при ненулевом rc cmd скрипт падает ДО присваивания _rc=$?, и любой следующий cleanup/'[ "$_rc" -eq 0 ] || ...' мёртв. Set -e не подавляется только в условиях if/while/&&/||/!. Fix: 'if ! cmd args; then ...; fi' либо 'cmd args || _rc=$?; _rc=${_rc:-0}'. Найдено в install_simple.sh:405-408 (install_nikki_via_github) 2026-04-28: cleanup _stage и return 1 на rc!=0 не выполнялись.

2026-04-28 TR3000 v1 (MT7981, OpenWrt 25.12.2) на провайдере X: 5GHz sae-mixed, ch.36 HE80, country=RU, ocv=0, cell_density=0. Шторм реконнектов phy1-ap0 STA 98:59:7a:99:fb:ab + e2:ab:0e:33:99:c8 каждые 8-60с, auth_alg чередуется sae<->open (PMKSA cache fail -> full SAE). Сигнал клиентов -45 dBm (близко). Клиенты — несколько шт. вкл. SmartTV/возможно Яндекс. Драйверных/firmware ошибок нет, mt798x-wmac OK. Гипотеза: PMF=optional на sae-mixed, часть клиентов не держит PMKSA. TODO: проверить дома на другом провайдере — повторится ли тот же паттерн на тех же клиентах. Если да — это конфиг (фикс: psk2+ccmp ИЛИ sae+ieee80211w=2). Если нет — RF/ISP env (помехи соседних AP, провайдерские ARP-штормы). Логи: hostapd reconnect cycles, никаких kernel/mt76 ошибок.

TR3000 на 2026-04-28 02:30 UTC: AGH удалён (нет бинарника, нет init.d), dnsmasq заменил на :53 (slушает 192.168.1.1, 100.64.13.199 WAN). Mihomo profile содержит ТОЛЬКО [AWG-home, DIRECT] для PROXY/FINAL — VLESS-REALITY удалён. Endpoint AWG: azzazel.art:443/UDP → 178.17.51.81. nikki.mixin.fake_ip_filter='0' (только +.lan +.local — все домены через fakeip). Force-DNS DNAT работает (14k+ UDP пакетов). state-file /etc/openwrt-setup-state пустой — install.sh не отрабатывал или файл потерян. dnsmasq concurrent queries reached (max:150) в 02:20.

Windows/iPhone 'no internet' diagnostic fingerprint (validated 2026-04-28 на TR3000): mihomo /connections от клиента = 0, но conntrack показывает 500+ потоков ВСЕ на dport=53 (TCP+UDP к router и Yandex DNS) + DHCPREQUEST каждые 2 мин (NCSI-fail renew). Означает: DNS работает, но приложения сдались делать TCP — fakeip→PROXY dial падает в таймаут. НЕ значит что DNS broken. Probe в порядке: 1) /proxies/PROXY 'now' field — куда указывает; 2) /proxies/<that> history — если [] значит URL-test ни разу не запускался, alive:true это default; 3) если urltest отсутствует в profile — корень = dead PROXY без fallback.

DoH off in mihomo profile (2026-04-27): nameserver-policy/nameserver/fallback now plain UDP 1.1.1.1/1.0.0.1/8.8.8.8/8.8.4.4. Reverses earlier DoH-Cloudflare preference. Reason: DPI/throttle on RU CGNAT ISPs. AGH bootstrap and proxy-server-nameserver unchanged (already plain).

ucode runtime НЕ имеет builtin 'load()'. Загрузка .uc файла извне требует require() с настроенным module path или 'ucode -i mixin.uc' (выполняет top-level код, мутирует state). Offline dry-run для nikki mixin (/etc/nikki/ucode/mixin.uc) из чистого shell неосуществим. Workaround для проверки mixin output: post-service-start grep /etc/nikki/run/*.yaml на нужное поле (например 'listen: 0.0.0.0:53') после 'service nikki restart && sleep 5'. Discovered 2026-04-28 при ralplan iter2->iter3 для install_simple.sh.
